questions.q: According to a regulatory filing revealed in late April 2026, Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav's compensation package more than tripled in 2025 to what amount?
questions.correctText: David Zaslav's 2025 total compensation surged to $165 million, largely due to a massive stock option award.

questions.q: The US FDA proposed excluding which category of medications from the list of bulk drug substances that outsourcing facilities can use for compounding in May 2026?
According to its cinematic trailer released on April 30, 2026, when will 'Subnautica 2' officially enter Early Access?
questions.correctText: Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on PC and Xbox Series X/S on May 14, 2026.

questions.q: Which upcoming sci-fi action-adventure RPG released a 'Conversation Choices First Look' trailer in late April 2026 featuring the companion Phaedra?
questions.correctText: EXODUS released new gameplay footage showing a conversation with the Celestial virus-infected companion Phaedra.

questions.q: At the 2026 FIFA Congress in Vancouver, Gianni Infantino's attempt to orchestrate a handshake between delegates from which two football associations backfired?
The police department of which Canadian city denied a request to give FIFA President Gianni Infantino a police escort for the 2026 FIFA Congress?
Developed by former Burnout creators at Fuse Games, what is the official release date for the arcade racing game 'Star Wars: Galactic Racer'?
questions.correctText: Star Wars: Galactic Racer will officially be released on October 6, 2026 for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X/S.

questions.q: Developed by Unfrozen, which turn-based strategy prequel launched into Early Access on April 30, 2026?
options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era was released into Early Access, bringing back the classic strategy gameplay.

questions.q: Which former World No. 4 Japanese tennis player announced on May 1, 2026, that he plans to retire from professional tennis at the end of the season?
What is the name of the new vehicular action game from Strange Scaffold where you play as the vehicle that famously sends people to a fantasy world?
options: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?!
questions.correctText: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?! is a chaotic driving game built around the classic isekai anime trope.
